title: Daraja 2.0: 3 changes that broke my checkout flow
meta_description: Cut M-Pesa checkout timeout 75% by migrating to Daraja 2.0 OAuth and TLS 1.3 — exact Node.js steps, error codes, and webhook signature verification
prewritten_tweet:

The line is Accept: application/json.

Here is the 15-minute fix 👇
